## Description
Provide a summary of the changes and the related issue/feature ticket.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Chore / Documentation update

## Checklist
*Please verify each item before submitting:*

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or lint errors
- [ ] I have run local tests (`./gradlew test`) and they pass successfully
- [ ] I have verified that NO secret keys, tokens, or local credentials (e.g., `local.properties`) are being committed

## Screenshots / Video (if UI related)
Please attach screenshots or screen recordings showing the behavior before and after your changes.
